default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Kalil to the team, define roles, and review client portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Immediate Account Handoff:** Kalil will take over the Interwell account (4 articles/week) this week, as the current manager (Moses) is in the hospital and leaves Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Defined Roles:** Matt owns client comms and strategy; Kalil owns content production end-to-end, from Atlas pipeline to filing publishing tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [**Ramping Workload:** Kalil's weekly volume will ramp from 9–10 articles (Interwell + Immubit) to \~15 with the addition of Hex in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**Hybrid Workflow:** The production process balances using Atlas for efficiency with manual post-processing to ensure quality and meet deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure & Roles

  - [**Team:** Matt (Director), Kalil (Managing Editor), Lawrence (Managing Editor), Patricia (Content Manager).](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Director Role (Matt):**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Owns all client comms and overall account strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Leads performance analysis and value reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Collaborates with Jacob (Director, technical SEO) on projects like site audits and redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Managing Editor Role (Kalil):**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Owns content production end-to-end, from Atlas pipeline execution to post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [Files publishing tickets for Suleiman (in-house publisher).](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Provides strategic input based on production insights (e.g., identifying content gaps).](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

### Client Portfolio & Workload

  - [**Interwell:** 4 articles/week (2 SEO, 2 programmatic).](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Kalil's immediate takeover is needed due to Moses's absence and departure.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Build a "ketamine therapy" content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [**Immubit:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Status:** Moving to Matt's management; Kalil will take over next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Hex:** \~5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Status:** In strategy sprint (Week 5); handover to Kalil is planned for late Dec or early Jan.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Long-Term Goal:** All Managing Editors will manage three accounts by EOY Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Production Workflow & Tools

  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
    1.  [Matt assigns weekly articles via Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
    2.  [Kalil produces content using Atlas and manual post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
    3.  [Matt sends drafts to the client for review on Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
    4.  [Kalil implements edits from client feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
    5.  [Kalil files a Linear ticket for Suleiman to publish.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [**Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Atlas:** Primary AI content generation tool.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Airtable:** Central hub for content strategy and assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Linear:** Project management tool for publishing tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [**Prismic:** CMS used by Interwell; an external expert is assisting with a redirect project.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [Share the "production wiki" with Kalil via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [Share the Interwell Notion strategy doc.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [Rejoin the call in 30 minutes for a detailed Interwell handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Review the production wiki and Interwell Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [Begin producing this week's 4 Interwell articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ezeLhBCpg_7XNwBJfyjgcBr6Y2EaA1xW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
